default_binding.A2_SIGN: a line of mysterious paw prints
default_binding.A1_GEAR: the jump rope from the sledge
default_binding.A1_MARKER: a broom-handle flag with a red mitten
default_binding.A2_CREATURE1: Duchess, the neighbor's fluffy gray cat

slots.meaning: The older-sibling child protagonist who leads the expedition.
slots.guidance: A single kid-relatable leader (name or role); capable, imaginative, gentle with her companion.

slots.meaning: The hero's younger sibling companion who travels with her throughout.
slots.guidance: A younger, eager sidekick; never a source of peril; reacts with wonder and small worries (cold nose, tired toes).

slots.meaning: The whole imagined world the backyard becomes for the day's play.
slots.guidance: A cozy, bounded, familiar-turned-fantastic place; wonder over dread; no lethal hazards, no toxic air, nothing that cannot be safely left at any moment.

slots.meaning: A familiar yard object transformed by the day's condition, seen from the window at the very start.
slots.guidance: A small, homey detail (playground equipment, a garden feature); purely decorative, never hazardous.

slots.meaning: The condition or event that makes today's play possible (school closed, weather change, etc.).
slots.guidance: A benign, recurring-in-spirit condition; the reason today is special and free for imaginative play.

slots.meaning: The named staging point the team departs from and always returns to.
slots.guidance: A safe, always-reachable home base for the expedition (a porch, a doorway); never itself hazardous.

slots.meaning: The indoor spot where the team gears up before heading out.
slots.guidance: A mundane household room repurposed as a gear-up spot.

slots.meaning: The collective imaginative role the children take on for the day.
slots.guidance: A single kid-friendly team identity (explorers, pirates, astronauts) used throughout as their group name.

slots.meaning: The supervising adult who equips, checks on, and celebrates with the team.
slots.guidance: A warm, present, off-adventure adult presence (never joins the imaginative peril).

slots.meaning: The team's nickname for the real-world room the guardian works from (usually the kitchen).
slots.guidance: A playful mission-control-style nickname for an ordinary household room.

slots.meaning: The warm comfort drink or snack that fuels the expedition and rewards a retreat.
slots.guidance: A short, cozy comfort food/drink word; never itself a hazard.

slots.meaning: The notebook the team records discoveries and field notes in.
slots.guidance: A simple recording item (notebook, logbook, map roll).

slots.meaning: The small snack the team carries and later gives away as a kind gesture.
slots.guidance: A simple, shareable snack item; harmless to give to wildlife in the story's imaginative logic.

slots.meaning: The hand tool repurposed as a building/carving tool throughout the expedition.
slots.guidance: A blunt household tool (shovel, trowel, scoop); a builder's tool, not a weapon.

slots.meaning: The wheeled or sliding vehicle repurposed as cargo carrier, ambulance, and parade float across branches.
slots.guidance: A simple household vehicle (sled, wagon, wheelbarrow); always safe to ride or pull.

slots.meaning: The imagined landmark visible to the east/first route, reached by the mountain-climb and tracking tracks.
slots.guidance: A striking, climbable-looking feature built from an ordinary yard mound; distinct from route B's landmark.

slots.meaning: The climbable texture/character of route A's landmark up close.
slots.guidance: A safe, passable climbing texture (ledges, ridges); no dead-end hazards.

slots.meaning: The imagined open expanse visible to the west/second route, reached by the fort-building and rescue tracks.
slots.guidance: A wide, safe, open play surface; distinct from route A's landmark.

slots.meaning: The texture/quality of route B's expanse that makes it suited to building.
slots.guidance: A safe, workable surface quality (soft, packable, smooth).

slots.meaning: The visible clue that hints at and lures toward the tracking track (A2).
slots.guidance: A benign trail/sign noticed from a distance; distinct from B2's sign.

slots.meaning: The visible clue that hints at and lures toward the rescue track (B2).
slots.guidance: A benign visual landmark noticed from a distance; distinct from A2's sign.

slots.meaning: The small toy figures found frozen in place that the rescue track (B2) is about saving.
slots.guidance: Small, harmless toy figures; the peril is only imaginative (being 'stuck'), never real danger to them.

slots.meaning: The improvised climbing aid the team ropes up with at the start of the mountain track.
slots.guidance: A safe household object repurposed as climbing gear (rope, cord); no real climbing risk.

slots.meaning: The imagined climbable character of the mountain up close (ledges and handholds).
slots.guidance: A passable, climbable texture; no true fall hazard.

slots.meaning: The mid-climb weather obstacle that forces the push-on-or-retreat choice; names the retreat ending.
slots.guidance: A brief, non-lethal weather flurry; retreat is always safe and easy. Must be retreatable.

slots.meaning: The name for the top of the climbed landmark, reused across the summit sequence and both success endings.
slots.guidance: A short, triumphant name for 'the top'.

slots.meaning: The improvised marker planted at the peak in the flag-success ending.
slots.guidance: A simple household-object flag/marker assembly; purely decorative, plantable.

slots.meaning: Ending title: planting the marker at the peak (success).
slots.guidance: A short, proud, positive ending name naming the marker-planting achievement.

slots.meaning: Ending title: riding the vehicle down from the peak (success).
slots.guidance: A short, joyful, positive ending name naming the descent achievement.

slots.meaning: The small tracks the team follows through the tracking track.
slots.guidance: Small, neat animal-style tracks; harmless curiosity, not a threat sign.

slots.meaning: The yard feature the trail leads to and hides under/behind.
slots.guidance: A safe, enterable yard feature (a bush, a low structure).

slots.meaning: Ending title: discovering the first creature at the end of the tracking track (discovery).
slots.guidance: A short, wonder-filled discovery name; the creature is real and harmless (a neighborhood pet or common animal), never treated as a captured trophy.

slots.meaning: Ending title: discovering the second creature family at the end of the alternate tracking branch (discovery).
slots.guidance: A short, wonder-filled discovery name; the creature family is real and harmless, never treated as captured.

slots.meaning: The first real animal discovered at the end of the tracking trail (a neighborhood pet reimagined as an exotic creature).
slots.guidance: A familiar, harmless neighborhood animal; never harmed or frightened.

slots.meaning: The second real animal family discovered on the alternate tracking branch.
slots.guidance: A familiar, harmless small wild animal and her young; never harmed or frightened.

slots.meaning: The fort the team builds over the course of the building track.
slots.guidance: A cozy, safe snow/sand/found-material fort; never structurally dangerous.

slots.meaning: Ending title: finishing the fort as a cozy base (completion).
slots.guidance: A short, cozy completion name for the finished fort-as-base.

slots.meaning: Ending title: finishing the fort with a secret entrance tunnel (success).
slots.guidance: A short, proud success name for the finished secret tunnel.

slots.meaning: The messy misstep during the rescue that forces a retreat; names the retreat ending.
slots.guidance: A minor, non-lethal mess or mishap (a melted, re-frozen puddle); retreat is always safe. Must be retreatable.

slots.meaning: Ending title: caring for the rescued figures at a makeshift hospital (completion).
slots.guidance: A short, warm completion name for the caretaking finish.

slots.meaning: Ending title: celebrating the rescue with a parade (success).
slots.guidance: A short, celebratory success name for the parade finish.
